ddls:
CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., acousticness, danceability) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., audio, metadata) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value the feature can take */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value the feature can take */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_values" (
  "feature_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature value */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the feature value was recorded */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the feature for the given year */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track the feature value belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_values_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_values_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist's music */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity of the artist (on a scale of 0 to 1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who released the album */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the album was released */,
  "album_type" TEXT /* Type of the album (e.g., single, EP, LP) */,
  "tracks" INTEGER /* Number of tracks in the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature being analyzed for the track */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the track in minutes */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track in BPM */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_features" (
  "track_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track feature */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the feature for the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_features_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_features_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_tracks" (
  "artist_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_genres" (
  "album_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album genre */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_genres_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)
